raw_consumer_statement:
Home depot was to deliver flooring to my home. the pallet broke when they were delivering and threw the flooring on the ground in front of my home in a pile. It was damaged and store was contacted immediately. advised they would send a truck for pickup. when truck came for pickup, they said they could not take the items back in that condition and to trash the items and a refund would be issued. I have yet to receive a refund after numerous back and forth communication. I have attached a photo of the delivery condition. They are now trying to charge me interest on the disputed amount that I do not have. 

as per the credit card rule, if you are not satisfied with the merchandise, we qualify for all 3 requirements, in addition to the fact that we no longer have the items are per their instructions. Home depot/citi credit card stated they do not follow these regulations. Please assist with this matter.
